This file is a merged representation of a subset of the codebase, containing files not matching ignore patterns, combined into a single document by Repomix.
The content has been processed where empty lines have been removed, line numbers have been added.

================
File: src/app/api/pledge/route.ts
================
 1: import { createPledge } from '@/lib/supabase';
 2: import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
 3: export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
 4:   try {
 5:     // Get request data
 6:     const body = await request.json();
 7:     const { name, email, comment } = body;
 8:     // Basic validation
 9:     if (!name || !email) {
10:       return NextResponse.json(
11:         { success: false, message: 'Name and email are required' },
12:         { status: 400 }
13:       );
14:     }
15:     // Validate email format
16:     const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
17:     if (!emailRegex.test(email)) {
18:       return NextResponse.json(
19:         { success: false, message: 'Invalid email format' },
20:         { status: 400 }
21:       );
22:     }
23:     // Get IP and user agent for tracking (optional)
24:     const ipAddress = request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for') || request.ip;
25:     const userAgent = request.headers.get('user-agent');
26:     // Get preferred locale from headers or default to 'en'
27:     const acceptLanguage = request.headers.get('accept-language') || '';
28:     const locale = acceptLanguage.split(',')[0]?.split('-')[0] || 'en';
29:     // Create pledge in Supabase
30:     const result = await createPledge({
31:       name,
32:       email,
33:       comment,
34:       locale,
35:       ipAddress: ipAddress as string,
36:       userAgent: userAgent as string,
37:     });
38:     // For development mode, show the verification link
39:     if (result.success && result.verificationToken && process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_DEV_MODE === 'true') {
40:       const verificationUrl = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL || request.nextUrl.origin}/verify?token=${result.verificationToken}`;
41:       console.log('Development mode - Verification URL:', verificationUrl);
42:       return NextResponse.json({
43:         ...result,
44:         dev: {
45:           verificationUrl,
46:         },
47:       });
48:     }
49:     // Return the result
50:     return NextResponse.json(result);
51:   } catch (error) {
52:     console.error('Error processing pledge:', error);
53:     return NextResponse.json(
54:       { 
55:         success: false, 
56:         message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'An unknown error occurred' 
57:       },
58:       { status: 500 }
59:     );
60:   }
61: }

================
File: src/app/api/verify/route.ts
================
 1: import { verifyPledge } from '@/lib/supabase';
 2: import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
 3: export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
 4:   try {
 5:     // Get token from query parameters
 6:     const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
 7:     const token = searchParams.get('token');
 8:     // Validate token
 9:     if (!token) {
10:       return NextResponse.json(
11:         { success: false, message: 'Verification token is required' },
12:         { status: 400 }
13:       );
14:     }
15:     // Verify the pledge
16:     const result = await verifyPledge(token);
17:     // Return the result
18:     return NextResponse.json(result);
19:   } catch (error) {
20:     console.error('Error verifying pledge:', error);
21:     return NextResponse.json(
22:       { 
23:         success: false, 
24:         message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'An unknown error occurred' 
25:       },
26:       { status: 500 }
27:     );
28:   }
29: }

================
File: src/app/merchant-example/page.tsx
================
  1: 'use client';
  2: import React from 'react';
  3: import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
  4: import PageHero from '@/components/PageHero';
  5: import ContentSection from '@/components/ContentSection';
  6: import InfoCardGrid from '@/components/InfoCardGrid';
  7: import merchantCardData from '@/data/merchantCardData';
  8: import WoltButton from '@/components/WoltButton';
  9: import Link from 'next/link';
 10: export default function MerchantExamplePage() {
 11:   return (
 12:     <>
 13:       <PageHero 
 14:         title="Join Wolt as a Partner"
 15:         subtitle="Grow your business, increase orders, and reach more customers with Wolt's platform and delivery network."
 16:         color="primary"
 17:         imageUrl="/images/wolt-merchant.png"
 18:       />
 19:       <main>
 20:         <ContentSection bgColor="light">
 21:           <div className="text-center max-w-4xl mx-auto mb-12">
 22:             <motion.h2 
 23:               initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
 24:               whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
 25:               viewport={{ once: true }}
 26:               transition={{ duration: 0.5 }}
 27:               className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold mb-6"
 28:             >
 29:               Why partner with Wolt?
 30:             </motion.h2>
 31:             <motion.p
 32:               initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
 33:               whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
 34:               viewport={{ once: true }}
 35:               transition={{ duration: 0.5, delay: 0.1 }}
 36:               className="text-xl text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300"
 37:             >
 38:               Join thousands of businesses growing with Wolt. From restaurants and retail stores to grocery chains, 
 39:               we're helping partners of all sizes reach more customers and grow their business.
 40:             </motion.p>
 41:           </div>
 42:           <InfoCardGrid 
 43:             cards={merchantCardData}
 44:             className="mb-12"
 45:           />
 46:           <div className="flex justify-center">
 47:             <WoltButton 
 48:               variant="primary" 
 49:               size="large"
 50:               className="mx-2"
 51:             >
 52:               Apply as a partner
 53:             </WoltButton>
 54:             <WoltButton 
 55:               variant="secondary" 
 56:               size="large"
 57:               className="mx-2"
 58:             >
 59:               Contact sales
 60:             </WoltButton>
 61:           </div>
 62:         </ContentSection>
 63:         <ContentSection 
 64:           bgColor="dark"
 65:           imageUrl="/images/wolt-merchant-success.png"
 66:           imageAlt="Successful Wolt merchant"
 67:           imagePosition="left"
 68:         >
 69:           <h2 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold mb-6">Success stories</h2>
 70:           <p className="mb-4">
 71:             "Wolt has been a game-changer for our business. Since partnering with them, 
 72:             we've seen a 40% increase in orders and expanded our customer base significantly."
 73:           </p>
 74:           <p className="mb-4">
 75:             "The platform is easy to use, and their delivery network is reliable and fast. 
 76:             Our customers love the convenience, and we love the growth."
 77:           </p>
 78:           <p className="font-bold mb-2">Marie Jensen</p>
 79:           <p className="text-sm">Owner, Copenhagen Café</p>
 80:         </ContentSection>
 81:         <section className="py-16 bg-[--wolt-cyan] text-white">
 82:           <div className="container mx-auto px-4 text-center">
 83:             <h2 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold mb-8">Ready to grow your business?</h2>
 84:             <p className="text-xl mb-8 max-w-3xl mx-auto">
 85:               Join thousands of businesses partnering with Wolt to reach more customers, 
 86:               increase sales, and grow their business.
 87:             </p>
 88:             <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-4">
 89:               <Link 
 90:                 href="/apply"
 91:                 className="inline-block px-6 py-3 bg-white text-[--wolt-cyan] hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg font-medium transition duration-200"
 92:               >
 93:                 Apply as a partner
 94:               </Link>
 95:               <Link 
 96:                 href="/contact"
 97:                 className="inline-block px-6 py-3 bg-transparent border border-white text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg font-medium transition duration-200"
 98:               >
 99:                 Contact sales
100:               </Link>
101:             </div>
102:           </div>
103:         </section>
104:       </main>
105:     </>
106:   );
107: }

File: src/app/style-guide/page.tsx

  1: 'use client';
  2: import { useState } from 'react';
  3: import PageHero from '@/components/PageHero';
  4: import ContentSection from '@/components/ContentSection';
  5: import WoltButton from '@/components/WoltButton';
  6: import Link from 'next/link';
  7: export default function StyleGuidePage() {
  8:   const [count, setCount] = useState(0);
  9:   return (
 10:     <>
 11:       <PageHero
 12:         title="Wolt Design System"
 13:         subtitle="A comprehensive style guide based on Wolt's visual identity"
 14:         color="primary"
 15:       />
 16:       <main>
 17:         <ContentSection className="py-12">
 18:           <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto">
 19:             <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8">Typography</h2>
 20:             <div className="grid gap-6 mb-12">
 21:               <div className="p-4 border rounded-lg">
 22:                 <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-2">Heading 1</h1>
 23:                 <p className="text-gray-500">Font: Omnes Bold, 3rem (48px)</p>
 24:               </div>
 25:               <div className="p-4 border rounded-lg">
 26:                 <h2 className="text-4xl font-bold mb-2">Heading 2</h2>
 27:                 <p className="text-gray-500">Font: Omnes Bold, 2.25rem (36px)</p>
 28:               </div>
 29:               <div className="p-4 border rounded-lg">
 30:                 <h3 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-2">Heading 3</h3>
 31:                 <p className="text-gray-500">Font: Omnes Bold, 1.875rem (30px)</p>
 32:               </div>
 33:               <div className="p-4 border rounded-lg">
 34:                 <h4 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-2">Heading 4</h4>
 35:                 <p className="text-gray-500">Font: Omnes Bold, 1.5rem (24px)</p>
 36:               </div>
 37:               <div className="p-4 border rounded-lg">
 38:                 <p className="text-xl mb-2">Large Paragraph</p>
 39:                 <p className="text-gray-500">Font: Omnes Regular, 1.25rem (20px)</p>
 40:               </div>
 41:               <div className="p-4 border rounded-lg">
 42:                 <p className="text-base mb-2">Regular Paragraph</p>
 43:                 <p className="text-gray-500">Font: Omnes Regular, 1rem (16px)</p>
 44:               </div>
 45:               <div className="p-4 border rounded-lg">
 46:                 <p className="text-sm mb-2">Small Text</p>
 47:                 <p className="text-gray-500">Font: Omnes Regular, 0.875rem (14px)</p>
 48:               </div>
 49:             </div>
 50:             <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8">Colors</h2>
 51:             <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-12">
 52:               <div className="flex flex-col">
 53:                 <div className="h-24 bg-[--wolt-cyan] rounded-lg mb-2"></div>
 54:                 <p className="font-medium">Wolt Cyan</p>
 55:                 <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">#009DE0</p>
 56:               </div>
 57:               <div className="flex flex-col">
 58:                 <div className="h-24 bg-[--wolt-cyan-dark] rounded-lg mb-2"></div>
 59:                 <p className="font-medium">Wolt Cyan Dark</p>
 60:                 <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">#0087C1</p>
 61:               </div>
 62:               <div className="flex flex-col">
 63:                 <div className="h-24 bg-[--wolt-navy] rounded-lg mb-2"></div>
 64:                 <p className="font-medium">Wolt Navy</p>
 65:                 <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">#002A3A</p>
 66:               </div>
 67:               <div className="flex flex-col">
 68:                 <div className="h-24 bg-[--wolt-dark] rounded-lg mb-2"></div>
 69:                 <p className="font-medium">Wolt Dark</p>
 70:                 <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">#1A1A1A</p>
 71:               </div>
 72:               <div className="flex flex-col">
 73:                 <div className="h-24 bg-[--wolt-success] rounded-lg mb-2"></div>
 74:                 <p className="font-medium">Success</p>
 75:                 <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">#00C26C</p>
 76:               </div>
 77:               <div className="flex flex-col">
 78:                 <div className="h-24 bg-[--wolt-error] rounded-lg mb-2"></div>
 79:                 <p className="font-medium">Error</p>
 80:                 <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">#FF3B30</p>
 81:               </div>
 82:               <div className="flex flex-col">
 83:                 <div className="h-24 bg-[--wolt-warning] rounded-lg mb-2"></div>
 84:                 <p className="font-medium">Warning</p>
 85:                 <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">#FFCC00</p>
 86:               </div>
 87:               <div className="flex flex-col">
 88:                 <div className="h-24 bg-[--wolt-gray-100] rounded-lg mb-2 border"></div>
 89:                 <p className="font-medium">Gray 100</p>
 90:                 <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">#E6E6E6</p>
 91:               </div>
 92:             </div>
 93:             <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8">Buttons</h2>
 94:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 mb-12">
 95:               <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
 96:                 <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold">Primary Buttons</h3>
 97:                 <WoltButton variant="primary" size="large">Large Button</WoltButton>
 98:                 <WoltButton variant="primary" size="medium">Medium Button</WoltButton>
 99:                 <WoltButton variant="primary" size="small">Small Button</WoltButton>
100:                 <WoltButton variant="primary" disabled>Disabled Button</WoltButton>
101:               </div>
102:               <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
103:                 <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold">Secondary Buttons</h3>
104:                 <WoltButton variant="secondary" size="large">Large Button</WoltButton>
105:                 <WoltButton variant="secondary" size="medium">Medium Button</WoltButton>
106:                 <WoltButton variant="secondary" size="small">Small Button</WoltButton>
107:                 <WoltButton variant="secondary" disabled>Disabled Button</WoltButton>
108:               </div>
109:               <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
110:                 <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold">Tertiary Buttons</h3>
111:                 <WoltButton variant="tertiary" size="large">Large Button</WoltButton>
112:                 <WoltButton variant="tertiary" size="medium">Medium Button</WoltButton>
113:                 <WoltButton variant="tertiary" size="small">Small Button</WoltButton>
114:                 <WoltButton variant="tertiary" disabled>Disabled Button</WoltButton>
115:               </div>
116:             </div>
117:             <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8">Cards</h2>
118:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 mb-12">
119:               <div className="wolt-card p-6">
120:                 <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Standard Card</h3>
121:                 <p className="mb-4">This is a standard card with some content inside of it.</p>
122:                 <WoltButton variant="primary">Learn More</WoltButton>
123:               </div>
124:               <div className="wolt-feature-card">
125:                 <div className="wolt-feature-card-icon">
126:                   <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" className="h-8 w-8 text-white" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
127:                     <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z" />
128:                   </svg>
129:                 </div>
130:                 <h3>Feature Card</h3>
131:                 <p>A special card style for highlighting features with an icon.</p>
132:               </div>
133:               <div className="wolt-card p-6 bg-[--wolt-gray-50]">
134:                 <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Light Card</h3>
135:                 <p className="mb-4">A variant with a lighter background color.</p>
136:                 <WoltButton variant="secondary">See Details</WoltButton>
137:               </div>
138:             </div>
139:             <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8">Form Elements</h2>
140:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8 mb-12">
141:               <div className="space-y-4">
142:                 <div>
143:                   <label htmlFor="name" className="wolt-label">Name</label>
144:                   <input
145:                     type="text"
146:                     id="name"
147:                     className="wolt-input"
148:                     placeholder="Enter your name"
149:                   />
150:                 </div>
151:                 <div>
152:                   <label htmlFor="email" className="wolt-label">Email</label>
153:                   <input
154:                     type="email"
155:                     id="email"
156:                     className="wolt-input"
157:                     placeholder="Enter your email"
158:                   />
159:                 </div>
160:                 <div>
161:                   <label htmlFor="comment" className="wolt-label">Comment</label>
162:                   <textarea
163:                     id="comment"
164:                     rows={4}
165:                     className="wolt-input"
166:                     placeholder="Enter your comment"
167:                   ></textarea>
168:                 </div>
169:               </div>
170:               <div className="space-y-4">
171:                 <div className="wolt-stat">
172:                   <div className="wolt-stat-value">{count}</div>
173:                   <div className="wolt-stat-label">Clicks</div>
174:                 </div>
175:                 <div className="flex justify-center gap-2">
176:                   <WoltButton onClick={() => setCount(count - 1)}>-</WoltButton>
177:                   <WoltButton onClick={() => setCount(0)}>Reset</WoltButton>
178:                   <WoltButton onClick={() => setCount(count + 1)}>+</WoltButton>
179:                 </div>
180:               </div>
181:             </div>
182:             <div className="flex justify-center mt-12">
183:               <Link href="/" passHref>
184:                 <WoltButton variant="secondary">Back to Home</WoltButton>
185:               </Link>
186:             </div>
187:           </div>
188:         </ContentSection>
189:       </main>
190:     </>
191:   );
192: }

================
File: src/app/supabase-test/page.tsx
================
  1: 'use client';
  2: import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  3: import { supabase, isSupabaseConfigured } from '@/lib/supabase';
  4: import PageHero from '@/components/PageHero';
  5: import ContentSection from '@/components/ContentSection';
  6: import WoltButton from '@/components/WoltButton';
  7: import Link from 'next/link';
  8: export default function SupabaseTestPage() {
  9:   const [status, setStatus] = useState<'loading' | 'success' | 'error'>('loading');
 10:   const [message, setMessage] = useState('Testing Supabase connection...');
 11:   const [details, setDetails] = useState<{
 12:     url: string;
 13:     connected: boolean;
 14:     tablesFound: string[];
 15:     error?: string;
 16:   }>({
 17:     url: '',
 18:     connected: false,
 19:     tablesFound: [],
 20:   });
 21:   useEffect(() => {
 22:     async function checkSupabaseConnection() {
 23:       try {
 24:         if (!isSupabaseConfigured()) {
 25:           setStatus('error');
 26:           setMessage('Supabase configuration missing');
 27:           setDetails({
 28:             url: 'Not configured',
 29:             connected: false,
 30:             tablesFound: [],
 31:             error: 'NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and/or NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY not found in .env.local'
 32:           });
 33:           return;
 34:         }
 35:         // Get the Supabase URL (masked for security)
 36:         const url = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL || '';
 37:         const maskedUrl = url.replace(/^(https:\/\/[^.]+)(.+)$/, '$1***$2');
 38:         // Test simple query
 39:         const { data, error } = await supabase.from('pledges').select('created_at').limit(1);
 40:         if (error) {
 41:           setStatus('error');
 42:           setMessage('Error connecting to Supabase');
 43:           setDetails({
 44:             url: maskedUrl,
 45:             connected: false,
 46:             tablesFound: [],
 47:             error: error.message
 48:           });
 49:           return;
 50:         }
 51:         // Check which tables exist
 52:         const { data: tableData, error: tableError } = await supabase
 53:           .from('information_schema.tables')
 54:           .select('table_name')
 55:           .eq('table_schema', 'public');
 56:         const tables = tableData?.map(t => t.table_name) || [];
 57:         setStatus('success');
 58:         setMessage('Successfully connected to Supabase!');
 59:         setDetails({
 60:           url: maskedUrl,
 61:           connected: true,
 62:           tablesFound: tables,
 63:           error: tableError?.message
 64:         });
 65:       } catch (err) {
 66:         setStatus('error');
 67:         setMessage('Error checking Supabase connection');
 68:         setDetails({
 69:           url: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL || 'Unknown',
 70:           connected: false,
 71:           tablesFound: [],
 72:           error: err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Unknown error'
 73:         });
 74:       }
 75:     }
 76:     checkSupabaseConnection();
 77:   }, []);
 78:   return (
 79:     <>
 80:       <PageHero 
 81:         title="Supabase Connection Test" 
 82:         color="primary"
 83:       />
 84:       <main>
 85:         <ContentSection>
 86:           <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto py-10">
 87:             <div className={`p-6 rounded-lg mb-6 ${
 88:               status === 'loading' ? 'bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800' :
 89:               status === 'success' ? 'bg-green-50 dark:bg-green-900' :
 90:               'bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900'
 91:             }`}>
 92:               <h2 className={`text-xl font-bold mb-4 ${
 93:                 status === 'loading' ? 'text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200' :
 94:                 status === 'success' ? 'text-green-700 dark:text-green-300' :
 95:                 'text-red-700 dark:text-red-300'
 96:               }`}>
 97:                 {status === 'loading' && (
 98:                   <span className="inline-flex items-center">
 99:                     <svg className="animate-spin -ml-1 mr-3 h-5 w-5" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
100:                       <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4"></circle>
101:                       <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"></path>
102:                     </svg>
103:                     {message}
104:                   </span>
105:                 )}
106:                 {status === 'success' && (
107:                   <span className="inline-flex items-center">
108:                     <svg className="w-6 h-6 mr-2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
109:                       <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"></path>
110:                     </svg>
111:                     {message}
112:                   </span>
113:                 )}
114:                 {status === 'error' && (
115:                   <span className="inline-flex items-center">
116:                     <svg className="w-6 h-6 mr-2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
117:                       <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"></path>
118:                     </svg>
119:                     {message}
120:                   </span>
121:                 )}
122:               </h2>
123:               <div className="space-y-4 mt-6">
124:                 <div>
125:                   <h3 className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300">Supabase URL:</h3>
126:                   <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 mt-1">{details.url}</p>
127:                 </div>
128:                 <div>
129:                   <h3 className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300">Connection Status:</h3>
130:                   <p className={`mt-1 ${details.connected ? 'text-green-600 dark:text-green-400' : 'text-red-600 dark:text-red-400'}`}>
131:                     {details.connected ? 'Connected' : 'Not Connected'}
132:                   </p>
133:                 </div>
134:                 {details.tablesFound.length > 0 && (
135:                   <div>
136:                     <h3 className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300">Tables Found:</h3>
137:                     <ul className="list-disc list-inside mt-1 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">
138:                       {details.tablesFound.map(table => (
139:                         <li key={table} className={table === 'pledges' ? 'text-green-600 font-bold' : ''}>
140:                           {table} {table === 'pledges' && '✓'}
141:                         </li>
142:                       ))}
143:                     </ul>
144:                     {!details.tablesFound.includes('pledges') && (
145:                       <p className="text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 mt-2">
146:                         Could not find the 'pledges' table. Please make sure you've run the SQL setup script.
147:                       </p>
148:                     )}
149:                   </div>
150:                 )}
151:                 {details.error && (
152:                   <div>
153:                     <h3 className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300">Error:</h3>
154:                     <p className="text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 mt-1 p-2 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/30 rounded">
155:                       {details.error}
156:                     </p>
157:                   </div>
158:                 )}
159:               </div>
160:             </div>
161:             <div className="flex justify-center space-x-4 mt-8">
162:               <Link href="/" passHref>
163:                 <WoltButton variant="secondary">Back to Home</WoltButton>
164:               </Link>
165:               <Link href="/pledge" passHref>
166:                 <WoltButton>Go to Pledge Page</WoltButton>
167:               </Link>
168:             </div>
169:           </div>
170:         </ContentSection>
171:       </main>
172:     </>
173:   );
174: }

================
File: src/app/verify/page.tsx
================
  1: 'use client';
  2: import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  3: import { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation';
  4: import PageHero from '@/components/PageHero';
  5: import ContentSection from '@/components/ContentSection';
  6: import Link from 'next/link';
  7: import WoltButton from '@/components/WoltButton';
  8: import { getVerifiedCount } from '@/lib/supabase';
  9: export default function VerifyPage() {
 10:   const searchParams = useSearchParams();
 11:   const token = searchParams.get('token');
 12:   const [status, setStatus] = useState<'loading' | 'success' | 'error'>('loading');
 13:   const [message, setMessage] = useState('Verifying your pledge...');
 14:   const [count, setCount] = useState<number | null>(null);
 15:   useEffect(() => {
 16:     async function verifyPledge() {
 17:       if (!token) {
 18:         setStatus('error');
 19:         setMessage('No verification token provided. Please check your email link.');
 20:         return;
 21:       }
 22:       try {
 23:         // Call the verification API
 24:         const response = await fetch(`/api/verify?token=${token}`);
 25:         const data = await response.json();
 26:         if (data.success) {
 27:           setStatus('success');
 28:           setMessage('Your pledge has been verified successfully!');
 29:           // Get the new count after verification
 30:           const countData = await getVerifiedCount();
 31:           setCount(countData.count);
 32:         } else {
 33:           setStatus('error');
 34:           setMessage(data.message || 'Failed to verify your pledge. The link may be invalid or expired.');
 35:         }
 36:       } catch (error) {
 37:         console.error('Error verifying pledge:', error);
 38:         setStatus('error');
 39:         setMessage('An error occurred while verifying your pledge. Please try again later.');
 40:       }
 41:     }
 42:     verifyPledge();
 43:   }, [token]);
 44:   return (
 45:     <>
 46:       <PageHero
 47:         title={
 48:           status === 'loading' ? 'Verifying Pledge' :
 49:           status === 'success' ? 'Thank You!' :
 50:           'Verification Failed'
 51:         }
 52:         subtitle={
 53:           status === 'loading' ? 'Please wait while we verify your pledge...' :
 54:           status === 'success' ? 'Your pledge against Wolt has been verified' :
 55:           'We encountered an issue verifying your pledge'
 56:         }
 57:         color={status === 'success' ? 'primary' : status === 'error' ? 'secondary' : 'primary'}
 58:       />
 59:       <main>
 60:         <ContentSection>
 61:           <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto py-12">
 62:             <div className={`p-8 rounded-lg shadow-md ${
 63:               status === 'loading' ? 'bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-800' :
 64:               status === 'success' ? 'bg-green-50 dark:bg-green-900' :
 65:               'bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900'
 66:             }`}>
 67:               <div className="text-center mb-8">
 68:                 {status === 'loading' && (
 69:                   <div className="animate-pulse flex flex-col items-center">
 70:                     <div className="rounded-full bg-gray-300 dark:bg-gray-600 h-16 w-16 mb-4"></div>
 71:                     <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200">{message}</h2>
 72:                   </div>
 73:                 )}
 74:                 {status === 'success' && (
 75:                   <>
 76:                     <div className="flex justify-center mb-4">
 77:                       <svg className="w-16 h-16 text-green-500" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
 78:                         <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M9 12l2 2 4-4m6 2a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z"></path>
 79:                       </svg>
 80:                     </div>
 81:                     <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-100 mb-4">{message}</h2>
 82:                     {count !== null && (
 83:                       <div className="mb-6">
 84:                         <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300">You've joined</p>
 85:                         <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-cyan-600 dark:text-cyan-400">{count.toLocaleString()}</p>
 86:                         <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300">verified pledges against Wolt's unfair practices</p>
 87:                       </div>
 88:                     )}
 89:                     <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300">
 90:                       Thank you for standing with us against Wolt's unfair business practices. 
 91:                       Together, we can make a difference for restaurants, workers, and consumers.
 92:                     </p>
 93:                   </>
 94:                 )}
 95:                 {status === 'error' && (
 96:                   <>
 97:                     <div className="flex justify-center mb-4">
 98:                       <svg className="w-16 h-16 text-red-500" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
 99:                         <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2" d="M12 8v4m0 4h.01M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z"></path>
100:                       </svg>
101:                     </div>
102:                     <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-100 mb-4">{message}</h2>
103:                     <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300">
104:                       If you believe this is an error, please try clicking the link in your email again 
105:                       or contact us for assistance.
106:                     </p>
107:                   </>
108:                 )}
109:               </div>
110:               <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-4 mt-8">
111:                 <Link href="/" passHref>
112:                   <WoltButton variant="secondary">
113:                     Back to Home
114:                   </WoltButton>
115:                 </Link>
116:                 {status === 'success' && (
117:                   <Link href="/alternatives" passHref>
118:                     <WoltButton>
119:                       Explore Alternatives to Wolt
120:                     </WoltButton>
121:                   </Link>
122:                 )}
123:                 {status === 'error' && (
124:                   <Link href="/pledge" passHref>
125:                     <WoltButton>
126:                       Try Again
127:                     </WoltButton>
128:                   </Link>
129:                 )}
130:               </div>
131:             </div>
132:           </div>
133:         </ContentSection>
134:       </main>
135:     </>
136:   );
137: }

================
File: src/components/FeatureCard.tsx
================
 1: 'use client';
 2: import React from 'react';
 3: import Link from 'next/link';
 4: import WoltCard from './WoltCard';
 5: import { useLanguage } from '@/contexts/LanguageContext';
 6: import ImageContainer from './ImageContainer';
 7: interface FeatureCardProps {
 8:   title: string;
 9:   description: string;
10:   imageSrc: string;
11:   bgColor?: 'dark-blue' | 'dark-purple' | 'black';
12:   linkText?: string;
13:   linkHref?: string;
14:   className?: string;
15: }
16: export default function FeatureCard({
17:   title,
18:   description,
19:   imageSrc,
20:   bgColor = 'dark-blue',
21:   linkText,
22:   linkHref,
23:   className = ''
24: }: FeatureCardProps) {
25:   const { language } = useLanguage();
26:   // Background color mappings
27:   const bgColorMap = {
28:     'dark-blue': 'bg-[#001E2D]',
29:     'dark-purple': 'bg-[#1B0A2A]',
30:     'black': 'bg-black'
31:   };
32:   return (
33:     <WoltCard
34:       className={`${bgColorMap[bgColor]} text-white p-6 flex flex-col h-full ${className}`}
35:       hover
36:     >
37:       <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
38:         <div className="mb-4">
39:           <ImageContainer 
40:             src={imageSrc}
41:             alt={title}
42:             height={240}
43:             priority
44:           />
45:         </div>
46:         <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2">{title}</h3>
47:         <p className="mb-4 text-white/80 flex-grow">{description}</p>
48:         {linkText && linkHref && (
49:           <Link href={linkHref} className="text-[--wolt-cyan] hover:text-[--wolt-cyan-light] font-medium mt-auto inline-block">
50:             {linkText} →
51:           </Link>
52:         )}
53:       </div>
54:     </WoltCard>
55:   );
56: }

================
File: src/components/FeatureCardGrid.tsx
================
 1: 'use client';
 2: import React from 'react';
 3: import FeatureCard from './FeatureCard';
 4: import { useLanguage } from '@/contexts/LanguageContext';
 5: interface FeatureData {
 6:   id: string;
 7:   imageSrc: string;
 8:   bgColor?: 'dark-blue' | 'dark-purple' | 'black';
 9:   linkHref?: string;
10:   translations: {
11:     en: {
12:       title: string;
13:       description: string;
14:       linkText?: string;
15:     };
16:     da: {
17:       title: string;
18:       description: string;
19:       linkText?: string;
20:     };
21:   };
22: }
23: interface FeatureCardGridProps {
24:   features: FeatureData[];
25:   className?: string;
26: }
27: export default function FeatureCardGrid({
28:   features,
29:   className = ''
30: }: FeatureCardGridProps) {
31:   const { language } = useLanguage();
32:   return (
33:     <div className={`grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 ${className}`}>
34:       {features.map((feature) => (
35:         <FeatureCard
36:           key={feature.id}
37:           imageSrc={feature.imageSrc}
38:           bgColor={feature.bgColor}
39:           title={feature.translations[language].title}
40:           description={feature.translations[language].description}
41:           linkText={feature.translations[language].linkText}
42:           linkHref={feature.linkHref}
43:         />
44:       ))}
45:     </div>
46:   );
47: }

================
File: src/components/ImageContainer.tsx
================
 1: 'use client';
 2: import React from 'react';
 3: import Image from 'next/image';
 4: interface ImageContainerProps {
 5:   src: string;
 6:   alt: string;
 7:   height?: number;
 8:   className?: string;
 9:   priority?: boolean;
10: }
11: /**
12:  * A utility component for rendering images with consistent height and positioning
13:  * This fixes the "Image with fill and height 0" warnings from Next.js
14:  */
15: export default function ImageContainer({
16:   src,
17:   alt,
18:   height = 300,
19:   className = '',
20:   priority = false
21: }: ImageContainerProps) {
22:   // Ensure the image path is prefixed correctly
23:   const imageFullPath = src.startsWith('/') ? src : `/images/${src}`;
24:   return (
25:     <div 
26:       className={`relative w-full ${className}`} 
27:       style={{ 
28:         height: `${height}px`, 
29:         minHeight: `${height}px`, 
30:         position: 'relative' 
31:       }}
32:     >
33:       <Image 
34:         src={imageFullPath}
35:         alt={alt}
36:         fill
37:         className="object-contain"
38:         sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, (max-width: 1200px) 50vw, 33vw"
39:         priority={priority}
40:       />
41:     </div>
42:   );
43: }

================
File: src/components/InfoCard.tsx
================
 1: 'use client';
 2: import React from 'react';
 3: import WoltCard from './WoltCard';
 4: import ImageContainer from './ImageContainer';
 5: import Link from 'next/link';
 6: interface InfoCardProps {
 7:   title: string;
 8:   description: string;
 9:   imageSrc: string;
10:   imageAlt?: string;
11:   className?: string;
12:   linkText?: string;
13:   linkHref?: string;
14: }
15: /**
16:  * InfoCard component that resembles Wolt merchant page cards with top images
17:  * Used for displaying product information or features with a clean, modern layout
18:  */
19: export default function InfoCard({
20:   title,
21:   description,
22:   imageSrc,
23:   imageAlt = '',
24:   className = '',
25:   linkText,
26:   linkHref
27: }: InfoCardProps) {
28:   return (
29:     <WoltCard className={`flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden ${className}`}> 
30:       {/* Image container with padding */}
31:       <div className="px-6 pt-6 mb-4">
32:         <ImageContainer 
33:           src={imageSrc}
34:           alt={imageAlt || title}
35:           height={180}
36:           priority
37:           className="mx-auto rounded-lg"
38:         />
39:       </div>
40:       {/* Text content with padding */}
41:       <div className="flex flex-col flex-grow p-6 pt-0">
42:         <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-3 text-gray-900 dark:text-white">
43:           {title}
44:         </h3>
45:         <p className="text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 text-base flex-grow">
46:           {description}
47:         </p>
48:         {/* Optional link */}
49:         {linkText && linkHref && (
50:           <div className="mt-4 pt-2">
51:             <Link 
52:               href={linkHref} 
53:               className="text-[--wolt-cyan] hover:text-[--wolt-cyan-light] font-medium inline-flex items-center"
54:             >
55:               {linkText}
56:               <svg 
57:                 xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" 
58:                 className="h-5 w-5 ml-1" 
59:                 viewBox="0 0 20 20" 
60:                 fill="currentColor"
61:               >
62:                 <path 
63:                   fillRule="evenodd" 
64:                   d="M7.293 14.707a1 1 0 010-1.414L10.586 10 7.293 6.707a1 1 0 011.414-1.414l4 4a1 1 0 010 1.414l-4 4a1 1 0 01-1.414 0z" 
65:                   clipRule="evenodd" 
66:                 />
67:               </svg>
68:             </Link>
69:           </div>
70:         )}
71:       </div>
72:     </WoltCard>
73:   );
74: }

================
File: src/components/InfoCardGrid.tsx
================
 1: 'use client';
 2: import React from 'react';
 3: import InfoCard from './InfoCard';
 4: import { useLanguage } from '@/contexts/LanguageContext';
 5: interface InfoCardData {
 6:   id: string;
 7:   imageSrc: string;
 8:   linkHref?: string;
 9:   translations: {
10:     en: {
11:       title: string;
12:       description: string;
13:       linkText?: string;
14:     };
15:     da: {
16:       title: string;
17:       description: string;
18:       linkText?: string;
19:     };
20:   };
21: }
22: interface InfoCardGridProps {
23:   cards: InfoCardData[];
24:   title?: string;
25:   subtitle?: string;
26:   className?: string;
27:   columns?: 2 | 3 | 4;
28: }
29: /**
30:  * Grid layout for displaying InfoCards in a responsive grid
31:  * Ideal for feature sections, product showcases, or benefits listings
32:  */
33: export default function InfoCardGrid({
34:   cards,
35:   title,
36:   subtitle,
37:   className = '',
38:   columns = 3
39: }: InfoCardGridProps) {
40:   const { language } = useLanguage();
41:   // Determine grid columns based on props
42:   const gridCols = {
43:     2: 'md:grid-cols-2',
44:     3: 'md:grid-cols-3',
45:     4: 'md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4'
46:   };
47:   return (
48:     <div className={className}>
49:       {/* Optional title and subtitle */}
50:       {(title || subtitle) && (
51:         <div className="text-center mb-10">
52:           {title && (
53:             <h2 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900 dark:text-white">
54:               {title}
55:             </h2>
56:           )}
57:           {subtitle && (
58:             <p className="text-xl text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 max-w-3xl mx-auto">
59:               {subtitle}
60:             </p>
61:           )}
62:         </div>
63:       )}
64:       {/* Cards grid */}
65:       <div className={`grid grid-cols-1 ${gridCols[columns]} gap-6 md:gap-8`}>
66:         {cards.map((card) => (
67:           <InfoCard
68:             key={card.id}
69:             imageSrc={card.imageSrc}
70:             title={card.translations[language].title}
71:             description={card.translations[language].description}
72:             linkText={card.translations[language].linkText}
73:             linkHref={card.linkHref}
74:           />
75:         ))}
76:       </div>
77:     </div>
78:   );
79: }

================
File: src/components/PledgeForm.tsx
================
  1: 'use client';
  2: import { useState, FormEvent } from 'react';
  3: import WoltButton from './WoltButton';
  4: export type PledgeFormProps = {
  5:   onSuccess?: (data: any) => void;
  6:   onError?: (error: Error) => void;
  7:   className?: string;
  8: };
  9: export default function PledgeForm({ onSuccess, onError, className = '' }: PledgeFormProps) {
 10:   // Form state
 11:   const [name, setName] = useState('');
 12:   const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
 13:   const [comment, setComment] = useState('');
 14:   // UI state
 15:   const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
 16:   const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 17:   const [verificationUrl, setVerificationUrl] = useState<string | null>(null);
 18:   // Handle form submission
 19:   const handleSubmit = async (e: FormEvent) => {
 20:     e.preventDefault();
 21:     setIsSubmitting(true);
 22:     setError(null);
 23:     setVerificationUrl(null);
 24:     try {
 25:       // Submit pledge to API
 26:       const response = await fetch('/api/pledge', {
 27:         method: 'POST',
 28:         headers: {
 29:           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
 30:         },
 31:         body: JSON.stringify({ name, email, comment }),
 32:       });
 33:       const data = await response.json();
 34:       if (!data.success) {
 35:         // Handle error response
 36:         setError(data.message || 'Failed to submit pledge');
 37:         onError?.(new Error(data.message || 'Failed to submit pledge'));
 38:         return;
 39:       }
 40:       // Handle development mode verification URL
 41:       if (data.dev?.verificationUrl) {
 42:         setVerificationUrl(data.dev.verificationUrl);
 43:       }
 44:       // Clear form on success
 45:       setName('');
 46:       setEmail('');
 47:       setComment('');
 48:       // Call success callback
 49:       onSuccess?.(data);
 50:     } catch (err) {
 51:       // Handle network or unexpected errors
 52:       console.error('Error submitting pledge:', err);
 53:       setError('An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.');
 54:       onError?.(err instanceof Error ? err : new Error('Unknown error'));
 55:     } finally {
 56:       setIsSubmitting(false);
 57:     }
 58:   };
 59:   return (
 60:     <div className={`wolt-card p-6 ${className}`}>
 61:       <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-4 text-[--wolt-gray-800] dark:text-white">Sign the Pledge</h2>
 62:       {error && (
 63:         <div className="mb-4 p-3 bg-[--wolt-error] bg-opacity-10 border border-[--wolt-error] border-opacity-20 text-[--wolt-error] rounded">
 64:           <p>{error}</p>
 65:         </div>
 66:       )}
 67:       {verificationUrl && (
 68:         <div className="mb-4 p-3 bg-[--wolt-cyan] bg-opacity-10 border border-[--wolt-cyan] border-opacity-20 text-[--wolt-cyan] rounded">
 69:           <p className="mb-2">Development mode: Use this link to verify your pledge:</p>
 70:           <a 
 71:             href={verificationUrl}
 72:             className="text-[--wolt-cyan] underline break-all"
 73:             target="_blank"
 74:             rel="noopener noreferrer"
 75:           >
 76:             {verificationUrl}
 77:           </a>
 78:         </div>
 79:       )}
 80:       <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
 81:         <div>
 82:           <label htmlFor="name" className="wolt-label">
 83:             Name
 84:           </label>
 85:           <input
 86:             type="text"
 87:             id="name"
 88:             value={name}
 89:             onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}
 90:             required
 91:             className="wolt-input"
 92:             placeholder="Your name"
 93:             disabled={isSubmitting}
 94:           />
 95:         </div>
 96:         <div>
 97:           <label htmlFor="email" className="wolt-label">
 98:             Email
 99:           </label>
100:           <input
101:             type="email"
102:             id="email"
103:             value={email}
104:             onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
105:             required
106:             className="wolt-input"
107:             placeholder="Your email address"
108:             disabled={isSubmitting}
109:           />
110:         </div>
111:         <div>
112:           <label htmlFor="comment" className="wolt-label">
113:             Comment (optional)
114:           </label>
115:           <textarea
116:             id="comment"
117:             value={comment}
118:             onChange={(e) => setComment(e.target.value)}
119:             rows={3}
120:             className="wolt-input"
121:             placeholder="Why are you signing this pledge?"
122:             disabled={isSubmitting}
123:           />
124:         </div>
125:         <div>
126:           <WoltButton
127:             type="submit"
128:             disabled={isSubmitting}
129:             className="w-full justify-center"
130:           >
131:             {isSubmitting ? 'Submitting...' : 'Sign Pledge'}
132:           </WoltButton>
133:         </div>
134:       </form>
135:     </div>
136:   );
137: }

================
File: src/components/PledgeModal.tsx
================
  1: 'use client';
  2: import React, { useState } from 'react';
  3: import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion';
  4: import WoltButton from './WoltButton';
  5: import { useLanguage } from '@/contexts/LanguageContext';
  6: import Link from 'next/link';
  7: interface PledgeModalProps {
  8:   isOpen: boolean;
  9:   onClose: () => void;
 10: }
 11: export default function PledgeModal({ isOpen, onClose }: PledgeModalProps) {
 12:   const { language } = useLanguage();
 13:   const [name, setName] = useState('');
 14:   const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
 15:   const [comment, setComment] = useState('');
 16:   const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
 17:   const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
 18:   const [success, setSuccess] = useState(false);
 19:   const [verificationUrl, setVerificationUrl] = useState<string | null>(null);
 20:   const translations = {
 21:     en: {
 22:       title: 'Sign the Pledge',
 23:       subtitle: 'Join the movement against unfair business practices',
 24:       nameLabel: 'Your Name',
 25:       namePlaceholder: 'Enter your name',
 26:       emailLabel: 'Email Address',
 27:       emailPlaceholder: 'Enter your email',
 28:       commentLabel: 'Why are you signing? (Optional)',
 29:       commentPlaceholder: 'Share why you're joining the movement...',
 30:       submitButton: 'Sign the Pledge',
 31:       cancelButton: 'Cancel',
 32:       successTitle: 'Thank you for signing!',
 33:       successMessage: 'Please check your email to verify your pledge. Together we can make a difference!',
 34:       verifyNow: 'Verify Now (Development Only)',
 35:       closeButton: 'Close'
 36:     },
 37:     da: {
 38:       title: 'Skriv under på løftet',
 39:       subtitle: 'Deltag i bevægelsen mod uretfærdige forretningspraksisser',
 40:       nameLabel: 'Dit navn',
 41:       namePlaceholder: 'Indtast dit navn',
 42:       emailLabel: 'Email adresse',
 43:       emailPlaceholder: 'Indtast din email',
 44:       commentLabel: 'Hvorfor skriver du under? (Valgfrit)',
 45:       commentPlaceholder: 'Del hvorfor du deltager i bevægelsen...',
 46:       submitButton: 'Skriv under på løftet',
 47:       cancelButton: 'Annuller',
 48:       successTitle: 'Tak for din underskrift!',
 49:       successMessage: 'Tjek venligst din email for at bekræfte din underskrift. Sammen kan vi gøre en forskel!',
 50:       verifyNow: 'Bekræft nu (Kun udvikling)',
 51:       closeButton: 'Luk'
 52:     }
 53:   };
 54:   const text = translations[language];
 55:   const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 56:     e.preventDefault();
 57:     // Simple validation
 58:     if (!name.trim()) {
 59:       setError('Name is required');
 60:       return;
 61:     }
 62:     if (!email.trim() || !email.includes('@')) {
 63:       setError('Valid email is required');
 64:       return;
 65:     }
 66:     setError(null);
 67:     setIsSubmitting(true);
 68:     try {
 69:       // Submit the form to the API
 70:       const response = await fetch('/api/pledge', {
 71:         method: 'POST',
 72:         headers: {
 73:           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
 74:         },
 75:         body: JSON.stringify({
 76:           name,
 77:           email,
 78:           comment: comment.trim() || undefined,
 79:         }),
 80:       });
 81:       const data = await response.json();
 82:       if (!response.ok) {
 83:         throw new Error(data.message || 'Failed to submit pledge');
 84:       }
 85:       // Check if we have a verification URL for development testing
 86:       if (data.verificationUrl) {
 87:         setVerificationUrl(data.verificationUrl);
 88:       }
 89:       // Show success message
 90:       setSuccess(true);
 91:       // Reset form
 92:       setName('');
 93:       setEmail('');
 94:       setComment('');
 95:     } catch (err) {
 96:       setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'An unexpected error occurred');
 97:     } finally {
 98:       setIsSubmitting(false);
 99:     }
100:   };
101:   const modalVariants = {
102:     hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 50 },
103:     visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0, transition: { duration: 0.3 } },
104:     exit: { opacity: 0, y: 50, transition: { duration: 0.2 } }
105:   };
106:   if (!isOpen) return null;
107:   return (
108:     <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black bg-opacity-70">
109:       <AnimatePresence>
110:         <motion.div
111:           className="relative w-full max-w-md p-6 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded-xl shadow-xl"
112:           variants={modalVariants}
113:           initial="hidden"
114:           animate="visible"
115:           exit="exit"
116:         >
117:           {/* Close button */}
118:           <button
119:             className="absolute top-4 right-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 dark:hover:text-gray-300"
120:             onClick={onClose}
121:           >
122:             <svg className="w-6 h-6" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
123:               <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" />
124:             </svg>
125:           </button>
126:           {success ? (
127:             <div className="text-center py-6">
128:               <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-wolt-blue rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
129:                 <svg className="w-8 h-8 text-white" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
130:                   <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M5 13l4 4L19 7" />
131:                 </svg>
132:               </div>
133:               <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2 text-gray-900 dark:text-white">{text.successTitle}</h3>
134:               <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 mb-6">{text.successMessage}</p>
135:               {/* Show verification link in development mode */}
136:               {verificationUrl && process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' && (
137:                 <div className="mb-6">
138:                   <Link 
139:                     href={verificationUrl}
140:                     className="text-wolt-blue hover:text-wolt-blue-dark dark:text-wolt-blue-light dark:hover:text-wolt-blue underline"
141:                     target="_blank"
142:                     rel="noopener noreferrer"
143:                   >
144:                     {text.verifyNow}
145:                   </Link>
146:                 </div>
147:               )}
148:               <WoltButton onClick={onClose} variant="primary">
149:                 {text.closeButton}
150:               </WoltButton>
151:             </div>
152:           ) : (
153:             <>
154:               <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-1 text-gray-900 dark:text-white">{text.title}</h3>
155:               <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 mb-6">{text.subtitle}</p>
156:               {error && (
157:                 <div className="mb-4 p-3 bg-red-50 text-red-700 rounded-lg border border-red-200 dark:bg-red-900 dark:text-red-200 dark:border-red-800">
158:                   {error}
159:                 </div>
160:               )}
161:               <form onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
162:                 <div className="mb-4">
163:                   <label htmlFor="name" className="block mb-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300">
164:                     {text.nameLabel}
165:                   </label>
166:                   <input
167:                     type="text"
168:                     id="name"
169:                     value={name}
170:                     onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}
171:                     className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-wolt-blue focus:border-wolt-blue dark:bg-gray-700 dark:border-gray-600 dark:text-white"
172:                     placeholder={text.namePlaceholder}
173:                     disabled={isSubmitting}
174:                   />
175:                 </div>
176:                 <div className="mb-4">
177:                   <label htmlFor="email" className="block mb-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300">
178:                     {text.emailLabel}
179:                   </label>
180:                   <input
181:                     type="email"
182:                     id="email"
183:                     value={email}
184:                     onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
185:                     className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-wolt-blue focus:border-wolt-blue dark:bg-gray-700 dark:border-gray-600 dark:text-white"
186:                     placeholder={text.emailPlaceholder}
187:                     disabled={isSubmitting}
188:                   />
189:                 </div>
190:                 <div className="mb-6">
191:                   <label htmlFor="comment" className="block mb-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300">
192:                     {text.commentLabel}
193:                   </label>
194:                   <textarea
195:                     id="comment"
196:                     value={comment}
197:                     onChange={(e) => setComment(e.target.value)}
198:                     className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-wolt-blue focus:border-wolt-blue dark:bg-gray-700 dark:border-gray-600 dark:text-white"
199:                     placeholder={text.commentPlaceholder}
200:                     rows={3}
201:                     disabled={isSubmitting}
202:                   ></textarea>
203:                 </div>
204:                 <div className="flex justify-end space-x-3">
205:                   <WoltButton 
206:                     type="button" 
207:                     variant="secondary" 
208:                     onClick={onClose}
209:                     disabled={isSubmitting}
210:                   >
211:                     {text.cancelButton}
212:                   </WoltButton>
213:                   <WoltButton 
214:                     type="submit" 
215:                     variant="primary"
216:                     disabled={isSubmitting}
217:                   >
218:                     {isSubmitting ? (
219:                       <span className="flex items-center">
220:                         <svg className="animate-spin -ml-1 mr-2 h-4 w-4 text-white" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
221:                           <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4"></circle>
222:                           <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"></path>
223:                         </svg>
224:                         Processing...
225:                       </span>
226:                     ) : text.submitButton}
227:                   </WoltButton>
228:                 </div>
229:               </form>
230:             </>
231:           )}
232:         </motion.div>
233:       </AnimatePresence>
234:     </div>
235:   );
236: }

================
File: src/data/featureData.ts
================
  1: // Feature card data with both English and Danish translations
  2: const featureData = [
  3:   {
  4:     id: 'hidden-costs',
  5:     imageSrc: 'hidden_cost.png',
  6:     bgColor: 'dark-blue' as const,
  7:     linkHref: '/pricing',
  8:     translations: {
  9:       en: {
 10:         title: 'Hidden Costs',
 11:         description: 'Wolt adds extra fees and forces restaurants to increase prices, making you pay up to 40% more.',
 12:         linkText: 'See the real pricing'
 13:       },
 14:       da: {
 15:         title: 'Skjulte Omkostninger',
 16:         description: 'Wolt tilføjer ekstra gebyrer og tvinger restauranter til at hæve priserne, så du betaler op til 40% mere.',
 17:         linkText: 'Se de reelle priser'
 18:       }
 19:     }
 20:   },
 21:   {
 22:     id: 'unfair-pricing',
 23:     imageSrc: 'unfair_pricing.png',
 24:     bgColor: 'dark-purple' as const,
 25:     linkHref: '/pricing',
 26:     translations: {
 27:       en: {
 28:         title: 'Unfair Pricing',
 29:         description: 'High commissions (25-30%) and extra service fees squeeze both restaurants and customers.',
 30:         linkText: 'Learn more'
 31:       },
 32:       da: {
 33:         title: 'Uretfærdige Priser',
 34:         description: 'Høje provisioner (25-30%) og ekstra servicegebyrer presser både restauranter og kunder.',
 35:         linkText: 'Læs mere'
 36:       }
 37:     }
 38:   },
 39:   {
 40:     id: 'hurting-restaurants',
 41:     imageSrc: 'hurting_restaurants.png',
 42:     bgColor: 'black' as const,
 43:     linkHref: '/restaurants',
 44:     translations: {
 45:       en: {
 46:         title: 'Hurting Restaurants',
 47:         description: 'Local businesses lose profit margins and control over their brand when using Wolt.',
 48:         linkText: 'How restaurants suffer'
 49:       },
 50:       da: {
 51:         title: 'Skader Restauranter',
 52:         description: 'Lokale virksomheder mister fortjeneste og kontrol over deres brand ved brug af Wolt.',
 53:         linkText: 'Hvordan restauranter lider'
 54:       }
 55:     }
 56:   },
 57:   {
 58:     id: 'worker-exploitation',
 59:     imageSrc: 'fair_pay_for_workers.png',
 60:     bgColor: 'dark-blue' as const,
 61:     linkHref: '/workers',
 62:     translations: {
 63:       en: {
 64:         title: 'Worker Exploitation',
 65:         description: 'Couriers lack basic worker protections like sick pay, holiday pay, and guaranteed hours.',
 66:         linkText: 'Support fair conditions'
 67:       },
 68:       da: {
 69:         title: 'Udnyttelse af Arbejdere',
 70:         description: 'Kurerer mangler grundlæggende arbejderbeskyttelse som sygedagpenge, feriepenge og garanterede timer.',
 71:         linkText: 'Støt retfærdige forhold'
 72:       }
 73:     }
 74:   },
 75:   {
 76:     id: 'cancel-wolt',
 77:     imageSrc: 'cancel_wolt.png',
 78:     bgColor: 'dark-purple' as const,
 79:     linkHref: '/pledge',
 80:     translations: {
 81:       en: {
 82:         title: 'Cancel Wolt',
 83:         description: 'Join the movement to create a fairer food delivery ecosystem in Denmark.',
 84:         linkText: 'Sign the pledge'
 85:       },
 86:       da: {
 87:         title: 'Afbestil Wolt',
 88:         description: 'Deltag i bevægelsen for at skabe et mere retfærdigt madleveringsøkosystem i Danmark.',
 89:         linkText: 'Skriv under på løftet'
 90:       }
 91:     }
 92:   },
 93:   {
 94:     id: 'join-movement',
 95:     imageSrc: 'join_the_movement.png',
 96:     bgColor: 'black' as const,
 97:     linkHref: '/alternatives',
 98:     translations: {
 99:       en: {
100:         title: 'Better Alternatives',
101:         description: 'Switch to platforms that treat workers fairly and charge restaurants reasonable fees.',
102:         linkText: 'Find alternatives'
103:       },
104:       da: {
105:         title: 'Bedre Alternativer',
106:         description: 'Skift til platforme, der behandler arbejdere fair og opkræver restauranter rimelige gebyrer.',
107:         linkText: 'Find alternativer'
108:       }
109:     }
110:   }
111: ];
112: export default featureData;

================
File: src/data/merchantCardData.ts
================
 1: // Sample data for merchant info cards
 2: const merchantCardData = [
 3:   {
 4:     id: 'growth',
 5:     imageSrc: '/images/wolt-growth.png',
 6:     linkHref: '/products/growth',
 7:     translations: {
 8:       en: {
 9:         title: 'Grow with Wolt',
10:         description: 'Access our active customer base by offering pickup and delivery in the Wolt app. Additionally, increase sales by reaching loyal customers with our subscription service Wolt+ – customers who order more from Wolt on average.',
11:         linkText: 'Learn more'
12:       },
13:       da: {
14:         title: 'Vækst med Wolt',
15:         description: 'Få adgang til vores aktive kundebase ved at tilbyde afhentning og levering i Wolt-appen. Derudover kan du øge salget ved at nå loyale kunder ved hjælp af vores abonnementstjeneste Wolt+ – kunder, der i gennemsnit bestiller mere fra Wolt.',
16:         linkText: 'Læs mere'
17:       }
18:     }
19:   },
20:   {
21:     id: 'orders',
22:     imageSrc: '/images/wolt-orders.png',
23:     linkHref: '/products/orders',
24:     translations: {
25:       en: {
26:         title: 'Get more orders',
27:         description: 'With Wolt, you can increase your orders by reaching our active customers. Registration is free, and pricing is commission-based. Additionally, Wolt Ads helps you increase your visibility and get even more orders in the Wolt app.',
28:         linkText: 'Learn more'
29:       },
30:       da: {
31:         title: 'Få flere bestillinger',
32:         description: 'Med Wolt kan du øge dine bestillinger ved at nå ud til vores aktive kunder. Tilmelding er gratis, og prissætningen er provisionsbaseret. Derudover hjælper Wolt Ads dig med at øge din synlighed og få endnu flere bestillinger i Wolt-appen.',
33:         linkText: 'Læs mere'
34:       }
35:     }
36:   },
37:   {
38:     id: 'delivery',
39:     imageSrc: '/images/wolt-delivery.png',
40:     linkHref: '/products/delivery',
41:     translations: {
42:       en: {
43:         title: 'Deliver to more customers',
44:         description: 'When an order is placed, Wolt\'s courier partners deliver to your customers in about 30 minutes. You can also connect your own website or app and deliver with Wolt Drive, offering express deliveries from your business to your customers\' homes within one hour.',
45:         linkText: 'Learn more'
46:       },
47:       da: {
48:         title: 'Levér til flere kunder',
49:         description: 'Når en bestilling er afgivet, leverer Wolts kurerpartnere til dine kunder på ca. 30 minutter. Du kan også forbinde din egen hjemmeside eller app og levere med Wolt Drive, der tilbyder ekspresleveringer fra din virksomhed til dine kunders hjem indenfor én time.',
50:         linkText: 'Læs mere'
51:       }
52:     }
53:   }

================
File: src/lib/supabase.ts
================
  1: import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
  2: import type { Database } from '@/types/supabase';
  3: // Get environment variables
  4: const supabaseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL || '';
  5: const supabaseAnonKey = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY || '';
  6: // Check if we have the required environment variables
  7: // In development, provide helpful error messages
  8: if (!supabaseUrl) {
  9:   console.error('⚠️ NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL is not defined! Please check your .env.local file.');
 10: }
 11: if (!supabaseAnonKey) {
 12:   console.error('⚠️ NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY is not defined! Please check your .env.local file.');
 13: }
 14: // Check if Supabase is configured with required environment variables
 15: export const isSupabaseConfigured = () => {
 16:   return (
 17:     process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL &&
 18:     process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
 19:   );
 20: };
 21: // Create a Supabase client if environment variables are available
 22: export const supabase = isSupabaseConfigured()
 23:   ? createClient<Database>(
 24:       process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
 25:       process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!
 26:     )
 27:   : createDummyClient();
 28: // Create a type for the pledges table
 29: export type Pledge = {
 30:   id: string;
 31:   created_at: string;
 32:   name: string;
 33:   email: string;
 34:   comment?: string;
 35:   verified: boolean;
 36:   verification_token: string;
 37: };
 38: // Helper functions for pledge management
 39: export async function createPledge({
 40:   name,
 41:   email,
 42:   comment,
 43:   locale,
 44:   ipAddress,
 45:   userAgent,
 46: }: {
 47:   name: string;
 48:   email: string;
 49:   comment?: string;
 50:   locale?: string;
 51:   ipAddress?: string;
 52:   userAgent?: string;
 53: }) {
 54:   // Check if Supabase is configured
 55:   if (!isSupabaseConfigured()) {
 56:     console.warn('Supabase not configured, pledge creation skipped');
 57:     if (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_DEV_MODE === 'true') {
 58:       // Auto-generate a verification token for development mode
 59:       return {
 60:         success: true,
 61:         verificationToken: crypto.randomUUID(),
 62:         message: 'Dev mode - no actual pledge created',
 63:       };
 64:     }
 65:     return { success: false, message: 'Supabase not configured' };
 66:   }
 67:   // Check if this email has already pledged
 68:   const { data: existingPledge } = await supabase
 69:     .from('pledges')
 70:     .select('verified')
 71:     .eq('email', email)
 72:     .maybeSingle();
 73:   if (existingPledge) {
 74:     if (existingPledge.verified) {
 75:       return {
 76:         success: false,
 77:         message: 'This email has already verified a pledge',
 78:       };
 79:     }
 80:     // If pledge exists but not verified, we'll allow recreating it
 81:   }
 82:   // Insert new pledge
 83:   const { data, error } = await supabase
 84:     .from('pledges')
 85:     .upsert(
 86:       {
 87:         name,
 88:         email,
 89:         comment,
 90:         verified: false,
 91:         verification_token: crypto.randomUUID(),
 92:         ip_address: ipAddress,
 93:         user_agent: userAgent,
 94:         locale,
 95:       },
 96:       { onConflict: 'email' }
 97:     )
 98:     .select('verification_token')
 99:     .single();
100:   if (error) {
101:     console.error('Error creating pledge:', error);
102:     return { success: false, message: 'Failed to create pledge' };
103:   }
104:   // Special case for auto-verification (for development/testing)
105:   // The site owner can auto-verify their pledges
106:   if (email === process.env.ADMIN_EMAIL) {
107:     await supabase
108:       .from('pledges')
109:       .update({ verified: true, verified_at: new Date().toISOString() })
110:       .eq('email', email);
111:     return {
112:       success: true,
113:       message: 'Pledge auto-verified for admin email',
114:       autoVerified: true,
115:     };
116:   }
117:   // Return verification token to be used in email
118:   return {
119:     success: true,
120:     verificationToken: data.verification_token,
121:     message: 'Pledge created successfully',
122:   };
123: }
124: export async function verifyPledge(token: string) {
125:   // Check if Supabase is configured
126:   if (!isSupabaseConfigured()) {
127:     console.warn('Supabase not configured, verification skipped');
128:     return { 
129:       success: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_DEV_MODE === 'true',
130:       message: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_DEV_MODE === 'true' 
131:         ? 'Dev mode - verification simulated'
132:         : 'Supabase not configured'
133:     };
134:   }
135:   // Call the verify_pledge function
136:   const { data, error } = await supabase
137:     .rpc('verify_pledge', { token })
138:     .single();
139:   if (error) {
140:     console.error('Error verifying pledge:', error);
141:     return { success: false, message: 'Failed to verify pledge' };
142:   }
143:   return {
144:     success: data as boolean,
145:     message: data ? 'Pledge verified successfully' : 'Invalid or expired verification token',
146:   };
147: }
148: export async function getVerifiedCount() {
149:   // Check if Supabase is configured
150:   if (!isSupabaseConfigured()) {
151:     console.warn('Supabase not configured, returning dummy count');
152:     return { count: 0 };
153:   }
154:   // Call the get_verified_pledge_count function
155:   const { data, error } = await supabase
156:     .rpc('get_verified_pledge_count')
157:     .single();
158:   if (error) {
159:     console.error('Error getting verified count:', error);
160:     return { count: 0 };
161:   }
162:   return { count: data as number };
163: }
164: // Create a dummy client for when Supabase isn't configured
165: // This prevents errors in development/testing environments
166: function createDummyClient() {
167:   console.warn(
168:     'Supabase environment variables missing, using dummy client'
169:   );
170:   // Return a mock client that logs operations but doesn't actually connect
171:   return {
172:     from: () => ({
173:       select: () => ({
174:         eq: () => ({
175:           maybeSingle: async () => ({ data: null, error: null }),
176:           single: async () => ({ data: null, error: null }),
177:           limit: async () => ({ data: null, error: null }),
178:         }),
179:         single: async () => ({ data: null, error: null }),
180:         limit: async () => ({ data: null, error: null }),
181:       }),
182:       insert: () => ({
183:         select: () => ({
184:           single: async () => ({ data: null, error: null }),
185:         }),
186:       }),
187:       upsert: () => ({
188:         select: () => ({
189:           single: async () => ({ 
190:             data: { verification_token: 'dummy-token' }, 
191:             error: null 
192:           }),
193:         }),
194:       }),
195:       update: () => ({
196:         eq: async () => ({ data: null, error: null }),
197:       }),
198:     }),
199:     rpc: () => ({
200:       single: async () => ({ data: 0, error: null }),
201:     }),
202:   } as any;
203: }
204: // Types for pledge functions
205: export type PledgeResult = {
206:   success: boolean;
207:   message: string;
208:   verificationToken?: string;
209:   autoVerified?: boolean;
210: };
211: export type VerificationResult = {
212:   success: boolean;
213:   message: string;
214: };
215: export type CountResult = {
216:   count: number;
217: };

================
File: src/styles/wolt-design-system.css
================
  1: /* Wolt Design System CSS
  2:  * This file implements styling based on Wolt's design language
  3:  */
  4: @font-face {
  5:   font-family: 'Omnes';
  6:   src: url('/Omnes Font Family/Omnes Regular.ttf') format('truetype');
  7:   font-weight: 400;
  8:   font-style: normal;
  9:   font-display: swap;
 10: }
 11: @font-face {
 12:   font-family: 'Omnes';
 13:   src: url('/Omnes Font Family/Omnes Bold.ttf') format('truetype');
 14:   font-weight: 700;
 15:   font-style: normal;
 16:   font-display: swap;
 17: }
 18: @font-face {
 19:   font-family: 'Omnes';
 20:   src: url('/Omnes Font Family/Omnes Medium.ttf') format('truetype');
 21:   font-weight: 500;
 22:   font-style: normal;
 23:   font-display: swap;
 24: }
 25: @font-face {
 26:   font-family: 'Omnes';
 27:   src: url('/Omnes Font Family/Omnes Light.ttf') format('truetype');
 28:   font-weight: 300;
 29:   font-style: normal;
 30:   font-display: swap;
 31: }
 32: @font-face {
 33:   font-family: 'Omnes';
 34:   src: url('/Omnes Font Family/Omnes SemiBold.ttf') format('truetype');
 35:   font-weight: 600;
 36:   font-style: normal;
 37:   font-display: swap;
 38: }
 39: :root {
 40:   /* Wolt color palette */
 41:   --wolt-cyan: #009DE0;
 42:   --wolt-cyan-rgb: 0, 157, 224; /* RGB value for Tailwind opacity */
 43:   --wolt-cyan-dark: #0087C1;
 44:   --wolt-cyan-dark-rgb: 0, 135, 193;
 45:   --wolt-cyan-light: #54BCEA;
 46:   --wolt-cyan-light-rgb: 84, 188, 234;
 47:   --wolt-navy: #002A3A;
 48:   --wolt-navy-rgb: 0, 42, 58;
 49:   --wolt-navy-light: #003E55;
 50:   --wolt-navy-light-rgb: 0, 62, 85;
 51:   --wolt-dark: #1A1A1A;
 52:   --wolt-dark-rgb: 26, 26, 26;
 53:   --wolt-gray-900: #1F1F1F;
 54:   --wolt-gray-800: #333333;
 55:   --wolt-gray-700: #4D4D4D;
 56:   --wolt-gray-600: #666666;
 57:   --wolt-gray-500: #808080;
 58:   --wolt-gray-400: #999999;
 59:   --wolt-gray-300: #B3B3B3;
 60:   --wolt-gray-200: #CCCCCC;
 61:   --wolt-gray-100: #E6E6E6;
 62:   --wolt-gray-50: #F3F3F3;
 63:   --wolt-white: #FFFFFF;
 64:   --wolt-success: #00C26C;
 65:   --wolt-success-rgb: 0, 194, 108;
 66:   --wolt-error: #FF3B30;
 67:   --wolt-error-rgb: 255, 59, 48;
 68:   --wolt-warning: #FFCC00;
 69:   --wolt-warning-rgb: 255, 204, 0;
 70:   /* Spacing system */
 71:   --space-1: 0.25rem;  /* 4px */
 72:   --space-2: 0.5rem;   /* 8px */
 73:   --space-3: 0.75rem;  /* 12px */
 74:   --space-4: 1rem;     /* 16px */
 75:   --space-5: 1.25rem;  /* 20px */
 76:   --space-6: 1.5rem;   /* 24px */
 77:   --space-8: 2rem;     /* 32px */
 78:   --space-10: 2.5rem;  /* 40px */
 79:   --space-12: 3rem;    /* 48px */
 80:   --space-16: 4rem;    /* 64px */
 81:   --space-20: 5rem;    /* 80px */
 82:   --space-24: 6rem;    /* 96px */
 83:   /* Typography */
 84:   --font-family-primary: 'Omnes', system-ui, sans-serif;
 85:   --font-size-xs: 0.75rem;    /* 12px */
 86:   --font-size-sm: 0.875rem;   /* 14px */
 87:   --font-size-base: 1rem;     /* 16px */
 88:   --font-size-lg: 1.125rem;   /* 18px */
 89:   --font-size-xl: 1.25rem;    /* 20px */
 90:   --font-size-2xl: 1.5rem;    /* 24px */
 91:   --font-size-3xl: 1.875rem;  /* 30px */
 92:   --font-size-4xl: 2.25rem;   /* 36px */
 93:   --font-size-5xl: 3rem;      /* 48px */
 94:   /* Border radius */
 95:   --radius-sm: 4px;
 96:   --radius-md: 8px;
 97:   --radius-lg: 12px;
 98:   --radius-xl: 16px;
 99:   --radius-full: 9999px;
100:   /* Box shadows */
101:   --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
102:   --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
103:   --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
104:   /* Animation durations */
105:   --duration-fast: 150ms;
106:   --duration-normal: 300ms;
107:   --duration-slow: 500ms;
108: }

110: body {

114:   background-color: var(--wolt-white);
115: }

278:   animation: fadeIn var(--duration-normal) ease-in-out;
279: }

282: }
283: @keyframes fadeIn {
284:   from { opacity: 0; }
285:   to { opacity: 1; }
286: }
287: @keyframes slideUp {
288:   from { transform: translateY(20px); opacity: 0; }
289:   to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
290: }

292: .relative > img[data-nimg="fill"] {
293:   object-fit: contain;
294:   padding: 0;
295:   margin: 0;
296: }
